10_we_are_not_here: We are not here to answer questions.
11_this_is_the_hall: This is the Hall of Kings.  No one enters without permission.
12_we_are_not_tour: We are not tour guides.  Ask a merchant in the Town Square.
13_our_duty_is_to: Our duty is to guard the Hall of Kings.
14_we_do_not_converse: We do not converse on duty.
15_logos_is_expecting_you: Logos is expecting you.  You may enter.
16_we_will_bring_aid: We will bring aid ammesos!  Guards, Guards!
17_you_have_won_the: You have won the Rite of Conquest.  Everyone will be summoned to the Hall of Kings.
18_oreha_you_have_completed: Oreh-a!  You have completed the Rite of Freedom.  You will soon be summoned to the Hall of Kings.
19_you_may_enter_the: You may enter the Hall of Kings now.
1_ohee_efhareesto_i_cannot: Ohee, efhareesto.  I cannot accept gifts while I am on duty.
20_what_has_happened_guards: What has happened?  Guards, to me!  Trouble!
21_parakalo_wait_we_will: Parakalo, wait.  We will summon the others."
22_no_one_may_enter: No one may enter the Hall of Kings until all the contenders have fully funded the Rite of Rulership.
23_bravo_you_have_won: Bravo!  You have won the Rite of Valor.  All will be summoned to the Hall of Kings.
24_you_have_completed_the: You have completed the Rite of Peace.  All will be summoned shortly.
25_it_looks_like_water: It looks like water to me.  I will trust your word in this matter.
27_we_will_see_to: We will see to Ugarte.  You need to report to the Hall of Kings.
28_a_murder_it_will: A murder?  It will be handled immediately.  Guards!
29_i_came_as_soon: I came as soon as I could.  I've dispatched the other guards to follow the assassin.  We need to get this man to a healer, and to report to the Hall of Kings.
30_you_are_under_arrest: You are under arrest for suspicion of murder.  You will go with me to the Hall of Kings amessos!.
31_if_this_is_not: If this is not an emergency, do not disturb us.  Go away.
32_how_did_you_open: How did you open this door?  It used to be locked.  Thief tools are illegal in the city of Silmaria.  If I catch you using them again, you will be arrested.  Go away.
33_you_are_summoned_to: You are summoned to the Hall of Kings.
34_i_have_orders_for: I have orders for your arrest for suspicion of murder.  You will come with us to the Hall of Kings.  Any resistance will be considered an admission of guilt.
3_the_bank_is_closed: The bank is closed.  You should go now.
4_you_should_not_be: You should not be out now.  There are sometimes thieves this time of night.
5_you_are_under_arrest: You are under arrest for suspicion of murder.  You will go with me to the Hall of Kings ammesos!
6_you_are_under_arrest: You are under arrest for fighting and disobeying the order of the guard of Silmaria.
7_you_must_stop_this: You must stop this fighting.  There is no fighting on the streets of Silmaria.
8_this_is_your_first: This is your first warning.  You will both be arrested if you fight on the streets again.
9_we_will_notify_logos: We will notify Logos that you have completed the Rite of Destiny.
